name: Can my boss fire me for back injury workers comp claim in Utah?
description: Illegal retaliation; document and report to Labor Commission.

mainEntity.name: Can my boss fire me for back injury workers comp claim in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; document and report to Labor Commission.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, retaliation is illegal; protected activity.**

Utah law prohibits firing for filing comp; violations lead to reinstatement, back pay.[1]

- Document all interactions.
- Report retaliation to Labor Commission.
- Keep claim separate from performance.

Attorney files anti-retaliation claim if occurs.[1] Safeguard your rights.
